name: Presence
descriptor: For businesses that want to get discovered in their local market.
services: Custom mobile-first website
Click-to-call above the fold on every mobile screen
Before/after photo gallery
SSL, hosting, and uptime monitoring
NAP citations across top directories (Yelp, BBB, ...)
LocalBusiness schema markup
Automated review generation (SMS sent to customers after job completion)
Monthly: GBP posts, photo uploads, keyword ranking report, technical SEO monitoring

name: Authority
descriptor: For businesses that want to excel in their niche and consistently grow their customer base.
label: one-time setup
services: Everything in Presence
Keyword-Optimized — service pages and city/area location pages, each
Payment Integration & Invoicing
Full schema markup (LocalBusiness, Service, FAQ, Review)
AEO — FAQ sections structured for Google AI Overviews
Internal linking architecture
Monthly: Full GBP management, ranking report with position changes, quarterly seasonal content, AEO monitoring

name: Dominance
descriptor: For businesses that want to own their market on every search of their customers use.
label: one-time setup
services: Everything in Authority
White-label mobile app — custom invoices and tap-to-pay from your phone
Full-scale site — every service, every location, every high-intent search covered
Emergency service landing page
Maintenance plan sign-up page
Financing integration (GreenSky, EnerBank, or Synchrony Home)
Advanced invoicing manager — QuickBooks + CaedoAi payment system
Full GEO — content cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews
Advanced AEO — HowTo pages, FAQPage schema, structured Q&A
Google Local Service Ads setup + first month management
Quarterly competitor gap analysis
Monthly: Strategy call, CRO review, LSA management, GEO/AEO updates, competitor report
